_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal evaluation of quality of life in 288 patients with neurofibromatosis 2.

_contextSnippet: NFTI-QOL is a disease-specific questionnaire that is quick and easy to administer. It shows good reliability and has the ability to detect significant changes over time in QOL of individual patients.
details: Quick and easy to administer with good reliability and ability to detect significant changes over time in QOL of individual patients
